title: BEACON: JWST NIRCam Pure-parallel Imaging Survey. IV. A Systematic Search for Galaxy Overdensities and Evidence for Gas Accretion Mode Transition
summary: We systematically search for galaxy overdensities using 20 independent fields with a minimum of six filters (F090W, F115W, F150W, F277W, F356W, and F444W) from BEACON, the JWST Cycle 2 NIRCam pure-parallel imaging survey. We apply an adaptive kernel-density estimation method that incorporates the full photometric redshift probability distribution function of each galaxy to map galaxy overdensities, and identify 207 significant ($>4\,σ$) overdensities at $1.5<z<5$. We measure the quenched-galaxy fraction, the median specific star formation rate (sSFR), the total halo mass, and the local galaxy density of each system. By investigating the correlation among these observables, we find that galaxy quenching proceeds in two paths:($i$) Overdensities within more massive halos exhibit higher quenched fractions and lower averaged sSFRs. This trend weakens at $z\gtrsim2$, consistent with cold gas streams penetrating shock-heated massive halos and sustaining star formation activity at early times. ($ii$) We also find a dependence of the same parameters on local densities at $z<2$, where the quenched fraction increases and the sSFR decreases toward higher densities. The environmental trend in sSFR weakens at $z\sim2$--$3$ and shows tentative evidence for a reversal at $z>3$, potentially due to a larger cold gas supply in earlier times. Our study reveals a complex interplay between individual galaxies and large-scale environmental properties, marking the onset of environmental effects on galaxy quenching in massive halos at cosmic noon.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST BEACON巡天数据，在1.5<z<5范围内发现207个显著星系过密区，揭示了星系淬灭的两种路径：大质量晕内淬灭和局域密度依赖淬灭
AI.motivation: 研究星系淬灭与环境（大质量晕和局域密度）的关系，探索环境效应在宇宙正午（z~2-3）时期对星系演化的影响
AI.method: 使用JWST BEACON巡天20个独立场、至少6个波段的NIRCam数据，采用自适应核密度估计方法结合完整的光度红移概率分布函数来识别星系过密区
AI.result: 发现207个显著过密区（>4σ），测量了淬灭星系比例、中位比恒星形成率、总晕质量和局域密度。发现星系淬灭有两种路径：1）更大质量晕内过密区有更高淬灭比例和更低sSFR；2）z<2时局域密度越高淬灭比例越高、sSFR越低
AI.conclusion: 星系淬灭与环境存在复杂相互作用，大质量晕内环境效应在宇宙正午时期开始影响星系淬灭，早期宇宙中冷气体供应可能逆转环境趋势

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究星系团/过密区与星系淬灭的关系，涉及宇宙正午时期的大质量晕和冷气体，与用户兴趣中的'cosmic noon'、'cold gas'、'star formation rate'等关键词有部分重叠。但论文主题是星系团环境与淬灭，而非用户核心关注的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或运动学。虽然作者列表包含Tommaso Treu，但整体方法（光度红移+核密度估计）和科学问题（环境淬灭）与用户主要研究方向（强引力透镜、高红移星系气体、尘埃、磁场）关联度中等。
recommendation.topic_fit: 中等。论文涉及宇宙正午、冷气体、恒星形成率等用户感兴趣的主题，但核心是星系团环境与淬灭，而非强引力透镜或高红移星系动力学/运动学。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。使用JWST NIRCam成像和光度红移识别过密区，与用户常用的强引力透镜建模、ALMA/IFU观测方法不同。
recommendation.author_fit: 中等。作者Tommaso Treu是用户核心作者之一，但其他作者与用户核心作者列表重叠较少。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等。利用JWST BEACON巡天数据系统搜索过密区并研究淬灭机制，有一定新颖性，但并非用户领域的前沿突破。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题为星系团环境与淬灭，而非用户核心的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学/运动学/偏振/多相气体。方法上未使用引力透镜或高分辨率光谱/干涉观测。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用BEACON（JWST第2周期NIRCam纯平行成像巡天）的20个独立天区（至少包含F090W、F115W、F150W、F277W、F356W和F444W六个滤光片），系统搜寻星系超密度。我们采用自适应核密度估计方法，结合每个星系的完整测光红移概率分布函数来绘制星系超密度图，并识别出207个在1.5<z<5范围内显著的（>4σ）超密度区。我们测量了每个系统的淬灭星系比例、中值比恒星形成率（sSFR）、总暗晕质量以及局部星系密度。通过研究这些可观测量的相关性，我们发现星系淬灭存在两条路径：（i）质量更大的暗晕内的超密度区表现出更高的淬灭比例和更低的平均sSFR。这一趋势在z≳2时减弱，与冷气体流穿透激波加热的大质量暗晕并在早期维持恒星形成活动相一致。（ii）在z<2时，我们还发现相同参数对局部密度的依赖性，即在高密度区域淬灭比例增加而sSFR降低。sSFR的环境趋势在z∼2–3时减弱，并在z>3时显示出反转的初步证据，这可能是由于早期宇宙中冷气体供应更充足。我们的研究揭示了单个星系与大尺度环境特性之间的复杂相互作用，标志着在宇宙正午时期大质量暗晕中环境效应对星系淬灭的开始。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，星系淬灭与环境存在复杂相互作用，大质量晕内环境效应在宇宙正午时期开始影响星系淬灭，早期宇宙中冷气体供应可能逆转环境趋势。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Comparison between eazy -derived photometric redshifts and spectroscopic redshifts compiled from various previous studies. Red dotted line corresponds to the outlier limit between photometric redshift and spectroscopic redshift. Grey dots correspond to the outliers.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：eazy导出的测光红移与从先前各项研究汇编的光谱红移之间的比较。红色虚线对应测光红移与光谱红移之间的离群值界限。灰点对应离群值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Mass completeness limit for the 20 selected BEACON fields. The 2D hexagon bins show the stellar mass distributions at \(0<z<8\) . Red open circles show the mass completeness limits calculated in the redshift bins with a step of 0.7, with the red line indicating its quadratic fitted function.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：20个选定BEACON天区的质量完备极限。二维六边形箱格显示在\(0<z<8\) 范围内的恒星质量分布。红色空心圆显示以0.7为步长的红移区间内计算的质量完备极限，红线表示其二次拟合函数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The flowchart of the overdensity map creation, following the direction of arrows. (1) Weighting of each galaxy is calculated by its photometric redshift PDF. (2) Each field is divided into redshift slices following the definition from Section III.1 (3) For each slice (red box), calculate surface density using Equation 6 around each galaxy (red dot) based on all surrounding galaxies. Different dot sizes represent different weights. (4) The surface density of each galaxy, where larger size and opacity corresponds to larger local surface density. (5) Dividing the mosaic into defined pixel grid. (6) Calculation on each pixel grid \((x,y)\) following Equation 11 . (7) Iterative calculation of global bandwidth. (8) Optimal global bandwidth selection based on LCV. (9) Map of local bandwidth of each galaxy calculated with \(h_{i}=h\times\lambda_{i}\) . (10) Edge correction factor map. (11) The final overdensity map with contour step of \(\Delta\delta=1\) . Each data point corresponds to galaxies that are located inside the redshift slice. Star markers show galaxies that are spatially included in the overdense region.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：超密度图创建的流程图，按箭头方向进行。（1）每个星系的权重由其测光红移PDF计算。（2）每个天区按照第III.1节的定义划分为红移切片。（3）对于每个切片（红框），基于所有周围星系，使用方程6计算每个星系（红点）周围的面密度。不同点大小代表不同权重。（4）每个星系的面密度，其中较大的尺寸和不透明度对应较大的局部面密度。（5）将拼接图像划分为定义的像素网格。（6）在每个像素网格\((x,y)\) 上按照方程11进行计算。（7）全局带宽的迭代计算。（8）基于LCV选择最优全局带宽。（9）使用\(h_{i}=h\times\lambda_{i}\) 计算的每个星系的局部带宽图。（10）边缘校正因子图。（11）最终的超密度图，等高线步长为\(\Delta\delta=1\) 。每个数据点对应位于红移切片内的星系。星形标记表示空间上位于超密区域内的星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Example of a two-dimensional overdensity map of the beacon_0055–3749 field at \(z=2.20\) . The map is plotted in the \(x\) – \(y\) plane, converted into comoving coordinates in the unit of cMpc. White contours indicate one-step increments of the overdensity factor ( \(\delta\) ). White dots mark galaxies that have a probability of being included within the map, accounting for their photometric redshift uncertainties. The star symbols denote galaxies located within the \(>1\sigma\) overdensity contour, representing the probable members of the overdense region. The inset panel in the bottom-left corner shows the photometric redshift distribution of galaxies within the redshift slice.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：beacon_0055–3749天区在\(z=2.20\) 处的二维超密度图示例。该图绘制在\(x\) – \(y\) 平面内，坐标转换为以cMpc为单位的共动坐标。白色等高线表示超密度因子（\(\delta\) ）的一步增量。白点标记那些有一定概率位于该图内的星系，考虑了它们的测光红移不确定性。星形符号表示位于\(>1\sigma\) 超密度等高线内的星系，代表超密区域的可能成员。左下角的插面板显示了该红移切片内星系的测光红移分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The distribution of halo mass of our overdensities as a function of redshift. Error bar represents 1 \(\sigma\) error of the halo mass estimation from bootstrapping. Solid circle: data points from this study, color-coded by their measured quiescent galaxy fraction (top) and median of specific star formation rate (bottom). Solid lines: dividing lines of the halo accretion modes to cold, hot, and cold in hot modes as predicted by Dekel and Birnboim ( 2006 ) . Dashed lines: median halo mass growth history for each present-day halo with a masses of \(\log{(M_{h}(z=0))}=12.0,13.0,14.0,\text{and }15.0\) , derived by Behroozi et al. ( 2013 ) . Small gray dot: local clusters detected with Sunyaev-Zel’dovich (SZ) effects with ROSAT All-Sky Survey (X-ray) or Planck Satellite (FIR) (Tarrío et al. , 2019 ) , South Pole Telescope (SPT; Bocquet et al. , 2019 ) , and Atacama Cosmology Telescope (ACT; ACTDESHSC Collaboration et al. , 2025 ) . Grey hex-plots: groups and protoclusters identified by Li et al. ( 2022 ) using halo-based group finder. Pentagon (green): protocluster candidates from Brinch et al. ( 2023 ) using a similar method to this study. Square (purple): high redshift protoclusters compiled from various studies. See Section IV.2 for detailed references.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：我们的超密度区暗晕质量随红移的分布。误差棒表示自举法得到的暗晕质量估计的1 \(\sigma\) 误差。实心圆：本研究的数据点，颜色编码表示其测量的静止星系比例（上）和中值比恒星形成率（下）。实线：Dekel and Birnboim (2006) 预测的暗晕吸积模式（冷模式、热模式和热中冷模式）的分界线。虚线：Behroozi et al. (2013) 推导的每个现今暗晕（质量分别为\(\log{(M_{h}(z=0))}=12.0,13.0,14.0,\text{and }15.0\) ）的中值暗晕质量增长历史。小灰点：通过Sunyaev-Zel’dovich (SZ)效应结合ROSAT全天巡天（X射线）或Planck卫星（远红外）（Tarrío et al., 2019）、南极望远镜（SPT; Bocquet et al., 2019）和Atacama宇宙学望远镜（ACT; ACTDESHSC Collaboration et al., 2025）探测到的局部星系团。灰色六边形图：Li et al. (2022) 使用基于暗晕的群搜寻器识别出的群和原星系团。绿色五边形：Brinch et al. (2023) 使用与本研究类似方法得到的原星系团候选体。紫色正方形：从各项研究汇编的高红移原星系团。详细参考文献见第IV.2节。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The snapshots of three examples of overdensities and their galaxy member candidates. Each panel shows each overdensity that described in Section IV.3 . Yellow circles represent the potential galaxy member in each galaxy system. Each small panel surrounding the main panels shows snapshots of each individual galaxy member, along with its derived stellar mass and sSFR. UVJ-selected quiescent galaxies are marked with “Q” . The histogram in the bottom-left corner of each small panel shows the photo- \(z\) PDF, with a pink vertical line indicating the redshift of the respective overdensity. Contours on the main panels have different increments: \(\delta=1\) step (top two panels) and \(\delta=2\) (bottom panel). This figure is a snapshot for the most massive system: BEACON_2325-1203_z1.55
figures.caption_zh: 图6：三个超密度区及其星系成员候选体的快照。每个面板显示第IV.3节描述的每个超密度区。黄色圆圈代表每个星系系统中的潜在星系成员。围绕主面板的每个小面板显示每个单独星系成员的快照，以及其导出的恒星质量和sSFR。UVJ选择的静止星系标记为“Q”。每个小面板左下角的直方图显示photo-\(z\) PDF，粉色竖线表示相应超密度区的红移。主面板上的等高线具有不同的增量：\(\delta=1\) 步长（上两个面板）和\(\delta=2\) （下面板）。此图是最大质量系统BEACON_2325-1203_z1.55的快照。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Continued. This figure is a snapshot for the highest quiescent fraction system: BEACON_0447-2637_z2.00
figures.caption_zh: 图7：续。此图是最高静止星系比例系统BEACON_0447-2637_z2.00的快照。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Continued. This figure is a snapshot for the highest overdensity factor system: BEACON_0332-2745_z3.32
figures.caption_zh: 图8：续。此图是最高超密度因子系统BEACON_0332-2745_z3.32的快照。

title: A high rate of foreground contaminants toward high-redshift galaxies resolved by JWST
comment: 15 pages, 11 figures, 4 tables (+3 pages, 2 figures, 1 table in Appendix). Accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: We present a study of high-redshift Ly$α$ emitters (LAEs) with multiple components using HST and JWST. High-redshift galaxies are mostly point-like objects on ground-based images, but they often exhibit multiple components in higher spatial resolution images. JWST for the first time allow detailed analyses on these individual components. We collect 840 spectroscopically confirmed LAEs at $z=2\sim7$ from the literature and nearly 50\% of them appear to have multiple components in JWST images. We further construct a sample of 248 LAEs that have two or more relatively isolated components in a circular aperture of 2$\arcsec$ in diameter. We estimate photometric redshifts for all 593 components of the 248 LAEs, and find that 68\% of them are `real components' with photometric redshifts consistent with the spectroscopic redshifts of the LAEs. The remaining components are mostly foreground objects. The fraction of the `real components' decreases rapidly with the projected distance to the LAE centers from $\sim80\%$ at $0\farcs2-0\farcs4$ to $\sim30\%$ at $0\farcs8-1\farcs0$. Our SED modeling results suggest that the majority of the LAEs are young, low-mass, low extinction starburst galaxies (partly due to a selection effect), and their `real components' have stronger star-forming activities than main-sequence galaxies. We investigate the potential impact of the high foreground contamination rate on previous studies based on ground-based images that often use a 2$\arcsec$ aperture for photometry, and find that some of key parameters such as stellar mass would have been largely affected.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用HST和JWST观测高红移Lyα发射体(LAEs)，发现近50%的LAEs在JWST高分辨率图像中呈现多组分结构，其中68%为真实组分，其余多为前景天体。研究揭示了地面观测中2″孔径测光可能受前景污染影响。
AI.motivation: 高红移星系在地面观测中通常呈现点状，但高分辨率图像常显示多组分结构。JWST首次允许对这些单个组分进行详细分析，以了解LAEs的真实结构和组分性质，并评估地面观测中可能的前景污染问题。
AI.method: 收集了840个z=2~7光谱确认的LAEs，其中248个在2″直径圆形孔径内有两个或更多相对孤立组分。对所有593个组分进行测光红移估计，通过SED建模分析星系性质，比较组分与主序星系的恒星形成活动。
AI.result: 近50%的LAEs在JWST图像中呈现多组分结构；其中68%为"真实组分"(测光红移与光谱红移一致)；真实组分比例随投影距离增加而迅速下降(0.2-0.4″处约80%，0.8-1.0″处约30%)；LAEs多为年轻、低质量、低消光的星暴星系；真实组分恒星形成活动强于主序星系。
AI.conclusion: JWST高分辨率观测揭示了高红移LAEs的多组分结构特征，证实了显著的前景污染率。地面观测中常用的2″孔径测光可能严重影响关键参数(如恒星质量)的估计，强调了高分辨率观测对准确研究高红移星系的重要性。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为高红移Lyα发射体(LAEs)的多组分结构及前景污染，涉及JWST高分辨率成像和SED建模。用户兴趣画像中高权重关键词包括jwst、high-redshift galaxies、starburst、main-sequence galaxies等，与论文主题有较好匹配。但论文核心关注的是LAEs的组分识别和前景污染，而非用户最核心的强引力透镜或高红移星系动力学/运动学，且无核心作者匹配。因此评分中等。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题与用户兴趣画像中的jwst、high-redshift galaxies、starburst、main-sequence galaxies等关键词匹配，但未涉及用户最核心的强引力透镜、星系动力学/运动学、多相气体等主题。
recommendation.method_fit: 论文使用JWST高分辨率成像和SED建模，与用户兴趣画像中的jwst、SED建模方法有一定匹配，但未涉及用户常用的引力透镜方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 论文作者Weiyang Liu和Linhua Jiang不在用户核心作者列表中，无作者匹配。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文利用JWST首次详细分析高红移LAEs的多组分结构，揭示了前景污染对地面测光的影响，具有一定新颖性，但与用户核心兴趣领域的新颖性方向不完全一致。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文未涉及用户最核心的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学/运动学、多相气体等主题，且无核心作者参与。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用HST和JWST对具有多组分的高红移Lyα发射体（LAEs）进行了研究。高红移星系在地面图像中大多呈点状，但在更高空间分辨率的图像中常表现出多组分结构。JWST首次允许对这些单个组分进行详细分析。我们从文献中收集了840个光谱证认的z=2~7的LAEs，其中近50%在JWST图像中呈现多组分。我们进一步构建了一个包含248个LAEs的样本，这些LAEs在直径为2″的圆形孔径内有两个或更多相对孤立的组分。我们估算了这248个LAEs所有593个组分的光度红移，发现其中68%是“真实组分”，其光度红移与LAEs的光谱红移一致。其余组分主要是前景天体。“真实组分”的比例随与LAE中心的投影距离从0.″2-0.″4处的~80%迅速下降到0.″8-1.″0处的~30%。我们的SED建模结果表明，大多数LAEs是年轻、低质量、低消光的星暴星系（部分由于选择效应），其“真实组分”具有比主序星系更强的恒星形成活动。我们研究了高前景污染率对以往基于地面图像（通常使用2″孔径进行测光）的研究的潜在影响，发现一些关键参数（如恒星质量）可能受到很大影响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：JWST高分辨率观测揭示了高红移LAEs的多组分结构特征，证实了显著的前景污染率。地面观测中常用的2″孔径测光可能严重影响关键参数（如恒星质量）的估计，强调了高分辨率观测对准确研究高红移星系的重要性。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: 5 \(\sigma\) limiting magnitudes in a circular aperture of \(0\farcs 3\) diameter in the four fields.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：四个场中直径为\(0\farcs 3\)的圆形孔径内的5 \(\sigma\)极限星等。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Footprints of our JWST images. The gray area in the four panels show the footprints of our JWST images in the GOODS-S, GOODS-N, COSMOS, and UDS fields. A large part of them overlap with the HST HLF/CANDELS images. The red dots show the positions of all spectroscopically confirmed LAEs with multiple components in our LAE sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们的JWST图像的覆盖范围。四个面板中的灰色区域显示了我们在GOODS-S、GOODS-N、COSMOS和UDS场中的JWST图像的覆盖范围。它们大部分与HST HLF/CANDELS图像重叠。红点显示了我们的LAE样本中所有光谱证认的具有多组分的LAEs的位置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Example of two multi-component LAEs in our LAE sample. The upper row shows a \(z=5.656\) LAE from Jiang et al. ( 2017 ) and the lower row shows a \(z=6.595\) LAE from Ouchi et al. ( 2010 ) . The left three panels in each row show the ground-based narrowband, \(i\) , and \(z\) band images. The right five panels show HST F606W, HST F850LP/F814W, JWST F115W, JWST F200W, and JWST F356W images. The sizes are \(6\arcsec\times 6\arcsec\) . The diameters of yellow circles are \(2\arcsec\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们的LAE样本中两个多组分LAEs的示例。上一行显示来自Jiang等人（2017）的一个\(z=5.656\) LAE，下一行显示来自Ouchi等人（2010）的一个\(z=6.595\) LAE。每行左侧三个面板显示地面窄带、\(i\)和\(z\)波段图像。右侧五个面板显示HST F606W、HST F850LP/F814W、JWST F115W、JWST F200W和JWST F356W图像。尺寸为\(6\arcsec\times 6\arcsec\)。黄色圆圈的直径为\(2\arcsec\)。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Numbers of LAEs and components.
Figure 3: Redshift distribution of the LAEs in our final sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：我们最终样本中LAEs的红移分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Photo- \(z\) probability distributions \(P(z)\) for some components demonstrating our criteria to choose ‘real components’. The yellow regions are the \(P(z)\) and the blue vertical lines are the spec- \(z\) of the LAEs. Panels (a) and (b) show two ‘real components’ with narrow \(P(z)\) distributions covering the spec- \(z\) . Panels (c) and (d) show two components with broad \(P(z)\) distributions. The component in panel (c) is regarded as a ‘real component’ because it satisfies l68 \( u68 , while the component in panel (d) is not. Panels (e) and (f) show the \(P(z)\) distributions for the same ‘real component’ with a minimum redshift set to be 0 and 1.5, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：一些组分的Photo-\(z\)概率分布\(P(z)\)，展示了我们选择“真实组分”的标准。黄色区域是\(P(z)\)，蓝色垂直线是LAEs的spec-\(z\)。面板(a)和(b)显示两个具有覆盖spec-\(z\)的窄\(P(z)\)分布的“真实组分”。面板(c)和(d)显示两个具有宽\(P(z)\)分布的组分。面板(c)中的组分被视为“真实组分”，因为它满足l68 \( u68\)，而面板(d)中的组分则不是。面板(e)和(f)显示同一“真实组分”在最小红移分别设为0和1.5时的\(P(z)\)分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Fraction of ‘real component’ as a function of projected distance to the central ‘real component’ for the LAE sample and simulated sample. The top panel shows the fractions for the entire LAE sample (black), the \(z<3.8\) LAE subsample, and the \(z\geqslant 3.8\) LAE subsample. The error bar in the y-direction denotes the \(1\sigma\) Poisson error. The error bar in the x-direction denotes the range of distance in this bin. The gray shaded area in the middle panel shows the range between the 25th and 75th percentiles of the fractions for the entire simulated sample in the 8 simulated catalogs. The red/blue shaded area in the bottom panel shows the range between the 25th and 75th percentiles of the fractions for the simulated sample at \(z<3.8\) and \(z\geqslant 3.8\) in the 8 simulated catalogs.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：LAE样本和模拟样本中“真实组分”比例随与中心“真实组分”投影距离的变化。顶部面板显示整个LAE样本（黑色）、\(z<3.8\) LAE子样本和\(z\geqslant 3.8\) LAE子样本的比例。y方向误差棒表示\(1\sigma\)泊松误差。x方向误差棒表示该区间内的距离范围。中间面板的灰色阴影区域显示8个模拟星表中整个模拟样本比例的第25和第75百分位数范围。底部面板的红色/蓝色阴影区域显示8个模拟星表中\(z<3.8\)和\(z\geqslant 3.8\)模拟样本比例的第25和第75百分位数范围。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Fraction of ‘real component’ as a function of projected distance to the central ‘real component’.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：“真实组分”比例随与中心“真实组分”投影距离的变化。

title: Parametric Resonance and Backreaction Effects in Magnetogenesis from Ultralight Dark Matter
summary: We take a more detailed look at the recently proposed magnetogenesis mechanism triggered by ultralight dark matter coupled to electromagnetism. The proposed mechanism made use of a tachyonic resonance channel which leads to the exponential amplification of infrared modes. Here, we first investigate a possible narrow band parametric resonance channel which can produce photons at higher frequencies. Secondly, we estimate the effects of back-reaction on terminating the resonance. We find that there is indeed a narrow resonance channel. It is characterized by a Floquet exponent which is slightly smaller than the corresponding exponent for the tachyonic resonance. However, there is a region of parameter space (corresponding to a very small coupling constant) for which the tachyonic resonance is ineffective. In this case, the narrow resonance will dominate, and it will still be sufficiently strong to generate the observed magnetic fields on cosmological scales. Our analytical treatment of the back-reaction effects considered here indicates that a fraction of order one of the initial dark matter density can flow into the gauge fields. Hence, our magnetogenesis scenario appears to be robust to back-reaction effects.

AI.tldr: 该研究详细探讨了超轻暗物质耦合电磁场的磁生成机制，发现除了先前提出的红外模式指数放大的快子共振通道外，还存在一个窄带参量共振通道，能在更高频率产生光子，且在某些参数区域占主导地位。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是深入分析最近提出的超轻暗物质耦合电磁场的磁生成机制，探索可能的窄带参量共振通道，并评估反作用效应对共振终止的影响。
AI.method: 首先研究了可能的窄带参量共振通道，该通道能在更高频率产生光子；其次估计了反作用效应对终止共振的影响；通过分析Floquet指数和参数空间，比较了快子共振与窄带共振的效果。
AI.result: 确实存在窄带共振通道，其Floquet指数略小于快子共振的对应指数。在耦合常数非常小的参数区域，快子共振无效，此时窄带共振占主导，但仍足够强以在宇宙学尺度上产生观测到的磁场。反作用效应分析表明，初始暗物质密度中约1/3的部分可以流入规范场。
AI.conclusion: 该磁生成机制对反作用效应具有鲁棒性，窄带参量共振通道在特定参数区域能够有效产生宇宙学尺度的磁场，为超轻暗物质耦合电磁场的磁生成提供了更全面的理论支持。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究超轻暗物质耦合电磁场的磁生成机制，属于宇宙学与粒子物理交叉领域。用户的核心兴趣是强引力透镜，特别是星系-星系强透镜、高红移星系动力学与多相气体。论文主题（暗物质磁生成）与用户兴趣（透镜、高红移星系）仅有非常宽泛的暗物质关键词重叠，缺乏任何透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体或核心作者的重合。方法（参量共振、反作用）与用户领域完全无关。因此相关性极低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。仅匹配泛关键词'dark matter'和'magnetic fields'，但用户的核心主题是强引力透镜、高红移星系、尘埃、分子气体等，论文主题完全不涉及。
recommendation.method_fit: 无。论文使用理论物理中的参量共振和反作用计算，与用户常用的引力透镜建模、ALMA/JWST观测、动力学分析等方法无关。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者Nirmalya Brahma和Robert Brandenberger均不在用户的核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文在暗物质磁生成机制上有一定新颖性，但该方向与用户兴趣领域差异过大，新颖性无法转化为对用户的价值。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文属于纯宇宙学/粒子物理范畴，与用户主要关注的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等方向无实质关联。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们更详细地审视了最近提出的由超轻暗物质与电磁场耦合引发的磁生成机制。该机制利用了一个快子共振通道，导致红外模式的指数放大。在此，我们首先研究了一个可能的窄带参量共振通道，该通道可以在更高频率下产生光子。其次，我们估计了反作用效应对终止共振的影响。我们发现确实存在一个窄共振通道。其特征是Floquet指数略小于快子共振的相应指数。然而，存在一个参数空间区域（对应于非常小的耦合常数），在该区域快子共振无效。在这种情况下，窄共振将占主导地位，并且它仍然足够强，足以在宇宙学尺度上产生观测到的磁场。我们在此考虑的反作用效应的解析处理表明，初始暗物质密度中约一个量级的部分可以流入规范场。因此，我们的磁生成场景似乎对反作用效应具有鲁棒性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该磁生成机制对反作用效应具有鲁棒性，窄带参量共振通道在特定参数区域能够有效产生宇宙学尺度的磁场，为超轻暗物质耦合电磁场的磁生成提供了更全面的理论支持。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Evolution of the gauge field mode \(A_{k}\) and the background scalar field in the case of large coupling ( \({\tilde{g_{\phi\gamma}}}=5\times 10^{2}\) - see text for description of the curves), and for \(k_{T}=0.5k_{c}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在大耦合情况下（\({\tilde{g_{\phi\gamma}}}=5\times 10^{2}\) - 曲线描述见正文），以及对于\(k_{T}=0.5k_{c}\)，规范场模式\(A_{k}\)和背景标量场的演化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Evolution of the gauge field mode \(A_{k}\) and the background scalar field in the case of large coupling ( \({\tilde{g_{\phi\gamma}}}=5\times 10^{2}\) - see text for description of the curves), and for \(k_{T}=0.1k_{c}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在大耦合情况下（\({\tilde{g_{\phi\gamma}}}=5\times 10^{2}\) - 曲线描述见正文），以及对于\(k_{T}=0.1k_{c}\)，规范场模式\(A_{k}\)和背景标量场的演化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Evolution of the gauge field mode \(A_{k}\) and the background scalar field in the case of small coupling ( \({\tilde{g_{\phi\gamma}}}=1\) - see text for description of the curves), and for \(k_{T}=0.5k_{c}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在小耦合情况下（\({\tilde{g_{\phi\gamma}}}=1\) - 曲线描述见正文），以及对于\(k_{T}=0.5k_{c}\)，规范场模式\(A_{k}\)和背景标量场的演化。
